name: What evidence do I need to prove my law firm was unfairly excluded from AI search rankings?
description: Screenshots, loss data, bias proof; extremely hard without contract breach.[1]

mainEntity.name: What evidence do I need to prove my law firm was unfairly excluded from AI search rankings?

acceptedAnswer.text: Screenshots, loss data, bias proof; extremely hard without contract breach.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Evidence might include screenshots of competitor rankings, AI prompts showing bias, internal platform docs (hard to get), and harm metrics like lost clients.[1] Courts require showing intentional discrimination or contract breach, rare for AI.[1][3] Key factors: AI not lawyer, outputs discoverable, no privilege.[1][6] Gather analytics data, witness statements on client loss, avoid AI for research; subpoena records if suing.[1] Expert analysis essential.
